title: Isaiah's Perfect Pack Fabric
description: A small somewhat vanilla+ modpack to help make your experience more immersive and interesting
body:
**I originally made this pack for a private SMP with my friends but I decided to upload it for others to enjoy!!!**

**Features**

- New wildlife and mobs to make the world feel less empty and more alive
- New Foods and crops
- New QOL features 
- Better Performance and shaders
- A few Structures to visit and explore
- many new ways to automate and build cool contraptions with the create mod
